name: Garlic Broccoli Stir-Fry
tagline: Crisp-tender broccoli with garlic and chili — chromium, K, sulforaphane

hero.alt: Bright green broccoli florets stir-fried with garlic and red chili flakes
hero.caption: broccoli stir-fry — garlic, chili, charred edges

steps.title: Blanch the broccoli
steps.detail: Boil a pot of salted water. Drop florets in for exactly 60 seconds, then plunge into ice water. Drain well.
steps.tip: Blanch + ice bath = locked-in green colour and pre-cooked centre. Skip this and the centres stay raw.

steps.title: Sear with garlic
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a wide pan or wok till just smoking. Add garlic and ginger, sizzle 20 seconds. Add the drained broccoli and chili flakes. Sear without stirring for 2 minutes — let it char.
steps.tip: High heat is the trick — low heat steams the broccoli into mush.

steps.title: Season and finish
steps.detail: Splash in soy sauce, toss for 30 seconds. Add black pepper. Off heat, sprinkle toasted sesame. Serve immediately.
steps.tip: A squeeze of lime at the end lifts the whole dish.

healthFacts: Broccoli is a top dietary source of chromium — supports insulin sensitivity.
Sulforaphane (from chopped broccoli) supports liver phase-2 detox enzymes.
One cup covers full daily vitamin K and C needs.
Crucifer fiber feeds gut bacteria that produce short-chain fatty acids.
